features.name: disable statement targeting block containing fork
features.description: Code should include a named block containing a fork construct, with a disable statement targeting that block from outside the fork
features.snippet:
begin : label
  fork
    begin
      // fork body
    end
  join
end
disable label;

features.name: disable statement in function targeting block with fork
features.description: Code should include a function containing a named block with a fork, where the function uses disable to target that block

features.name: disable statement in task targeting block with fork
features.description: Code should include a task containing a named block with a fork, where the task uses disable to target that block

features.name: disable statement targeting block inside fork join
features.description: Code should include a disable statement targeting a begin-end block that is directly inside a fork-join construct
